## Decision 906: Fixture -- fence opens but never closes (Decided)

**Status:** Decided
**Date:** 2020-01-01

**Reversal conditions:**
This fixture's fenced stanza opens with the exact 'yaml reversal-conditions' info-string but has
no closing ``` marker before EOF -- the fence-close scan must report MALFORMED rather than
silently swallowing the rest of the file as stanza content.

```yaml reversal-conditions
decision: 906
review_by: 2099-01-01
on_trigger: "re-decide via /plan; update or re-arm this stanza"
conditions:
  - id: irrelevant-condition
    kind: manual
    description: "unreachable -- the unclosed fence fails before YAML parsing is attempted"
